authority_behavior: Defines MGA authority precedence and forbids silent contradiction resolution
notes: MGA-sensitive slices must preserve ScratchBird MGA over WAL reference logs parser state and file timestamps.

notes: Commit rollback visibility cleanup and recovery cannot use parser state WAL SQLite reference state UUID order or wall-clock order.

authority_behavior: Parsers are untrusted translation components and never transaction/authentication authority

scope: server listener manager IPC database open lifecycle
